R01_HUMAN_MODEL_PREDICTABILITY: (("explanations make" | "human predictions with explanations" | "predict model behavior" | simulatability) + (human | user | participant))
R02_ALGORITHMIC_TRANSPARENCY: (("algorithmic transparency" | "supporting algorithmic transparency" | "justified human trust") + (explanation | explainable))
R03_DECEPTIVE_MISLEADING_EXPLANATIONS: ("deceptive AI explanations" | "misleading black box explanations" | "misleading explanations" | "deceptive explanations")
R05_TRUST_AUTOMATION_RELIANCE: ("trust in automation" | "calibrated trust and reliance" | "trust in automated agents" | "decisional guidance paradigm")
R06_XAI_HUMAN_DECISION: (("explainable artificial intelligence" | "AI explanations") + ("human decision making" | "human decision-making" | "decision accuracy"))
R08_NATURAL_LANGUAGE_SIMULATABILITY: (("natural language explanation" | "non-trivial explanations" | rationale) + (simulatability | human | participant))
R09_CLINICAL_SYMPTOM_AUTOMATION: (("symptom checker" | "electronic prescribing" | "clinical decision support") + (explanation | trust | reliance | "automation bias"))
R10_EXPERT_PROFESSIONAL_DECISION: (("domain experts" | analyst | manager | professional | clinician) + ("misleading explanation" | "AI explanation" | "automation trust" | "algorithmic advice"))
R11_COMPLEMENTARY_TEAM_PERFORMANCE: (("complementary team performance" | "human AI team performance") + (explanation | AI))
